pages.zh: 鸭妈妈的孩子里，有一只长得和别人不一样。
pages.en: Among the mother duck's babies, one looked different from the rest.

pages.zh: 大家都笑他，他很伤心，独自离开了。
pages.en: The others laughed at him, so he sadly went away alone.

pages.zh: 过了一个冬天，他在湖里看到了自己。
pages.en: After a long winter, he saw his reflection in the lake.

pages.zh: 原来他变成了美丽的天鹅！每个人都会有闪光的时候。
pages.en: He had become a beautiful swan! Everyone has their moment to shine.

pages.zh: 乡下老鼠请城里老鼠吃简单的饭菜。
pages.en: The country mouse served the town mouse a simple meal.

pages.zh: 城里老鼠说：「来我家吃大餐吧！」
pages.en: The town mouse said, "Come to my house for a feast!"

pages.zh: 城里的食物很丰富，却总有猫和危险。
pages.en: The town had rich food, but also cats and danger.

pages.zh: 乡下老鼠回家了，平安简单的生活最快乐。
pages.en: The country mouse went home — a safe, simple life is happiest.
